thinks.think: Round pale golden cookies rest on a light wooden surface with scattered white coconut flakes. Centered white text reads "COCONUT CREAM COOKIES" over the baked goods. The camera pans slightly right, revealing additional cookies and flakes along the frame edge while keeping the central arrangement in focus.

The camera pans slowly across the light wooden surface, shifting the pale golden cookies within the frame. White text reading COCONUT CREAM COOKIES remains fixed in the center. Scattered white coconut flakes stay around the baked goods without movement. Lighting remains soft and consistent.

A hand enters from the top left, fingers reaching toward a central cookie that has been broken open to reveal a soft, pale interior. The fingers gently touch the exposed crumb of the broken cookie while the white text overlay remains fixed. Other round, golden cookies stay stationary on the light wooden board surrounding the interaction.

The scene transitions to an empty light wooden surface. A hand enters from the right, placing a large, clear glass bowl in the center of the frame. The previous cookies and text overlay are gone. The bowl reflects overhead lighting as it settles on the wood.

A small white bowl containing yellow butter is held over the clear glass bowl. Text reading BUTTER 3/4 CUP appears in the upper left corner. A hand uses a silver spoon to scrape the butter from the small container into the large mixing bowl.

The hand tilts the small white bowl further, using a silver spoon to scrape the remaining yellow butter into the large clear glass bowl below. The text BUTTER 3/4 CUP remains fixed in the top left corner as the yellow substance accumulates in the center of the larger vessel on the wooden surface.

The small white bowl is removed, leaving the yellow butter in the clear glass bowl. A white container pours white granulated sugar into the bowl on top of the butter. The text overlay in the top left corner changes to read SUGAR 1/4 CUP.

White granulated sugar pours from a white container into the clear glass bowl, accumulating on top of the yellow butter. After the pouring ceases, a pile of sugar sits centrally over the butter. The text overlay SUGAR 1/4 CUP remains visible in the upper left corner throughout the action on the wooden surface.

A distinct mound of packed brown sugar appears centrally in the glass bowl atop the white sugar and butter. The text overlay in the upper left corner changes to display BROWN SUGAR 3/4 CUP in white capital letters, marking the addition of the new ingredient to the mixture on the wooden surface.

The camera zooms in tightly on the glass bowl as a large quantity of loose, dark brown sugar is dumped in, scattering over the white sugar and butter. The granular brown mounds now dominate the bowl's contents. The white text overlay reading "BROWN SUGAR 3/4 CUP" remains stationary in the upper left corner against the wooden background.

Silver metal beaters from a hand mixer lower into the glass bowl, sinking into the mixture of brown sugar, white sugar, and butter. The white text overlay BROWN SUGAR 3/4 CUP remains in the top left corner. The beaters press down into the ingredients, positioning themselves for mixing on the wooden table.

Silver metal beaters spin rapidly within the glass bowl, blending the brown sugar, white sugar, and butter into a creamy mixture. The tight close-up shot excludes the previous text overlay, focusing entirely on the mechanical mixing action. A finger appears at the bottom right edge, steadying the bowl on the wooden surface as the ingredients combine.

Silver beaters spin rapidly inside the glass bowl, blending the butter and sugars into a smooth, pale tan cream. The mixture becomes more uniform as the granular texture disappears. A finger stays visible at the bottom right edge, steadying the bowl on the wooden surface while the mechanical mixing continues.

Silver beaters spin rapidly inside the clear glass bowl, blending the ingredients into a smooth, pale beige cream. The camera view widens to show the full bowl on the wooden surface. A hand steadies the bottom edge as the mixture becomes uniform and fluffy, losing its granular texture.

The silver beaters stop spinning inside the clear bowl containing the smooth, pale beige mixture. New white text appears in the top left corner reading "EGGS 2 EGGS". The creamy batter remains settled at the bottom of the bowl on the wooden table.

Two raw eggs are added to the pale beige creamy mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The bright yellow yolks and clear whites settle into the center of the batter. White text overlay in the upper left corner reads "EGGS 2 EGGS" as the ingredients are introduced.

A silver spoon enters from the top right, pouring a clear liquid over the two raw eggs resting in the beige batter. The white text overlay in the upper left corner updates to read "COCONUT EXTRACT 1 TSP" as the liquid is added to the mixture.

The silver spoon leaves the frame after pouring clear liquid onto the eggs. Two raw eggs with bright yellow yolks sit atop the creamy beige mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The text "COCONUT EXTRACT 1 TSP" remains displayed in the upper left corner. The bowl rests stationary on the light wooden surface.

Silver metal beaters from a hand mixer spin rapidly, plunging into the center of the bowl. The two bright yellow egg yolks break apart and swirl into the pale beige batter, blending with the previously added clear liquid. The mixture begins to combine, creating a marbled texture of yellow and tan as the beaters rotate vigorously.

Silver metal beaters spin rapidly, blending raw eggs and clear liquid into the pale beige batter. Bright yellow yolks break apart, creating swirling streaks of yellow within the creamy mixture as ingredients combine into a wetter consistency inside the clear glass bowl.

Silver beaters spin rapidly, fully incorporating the eggs into the batter. The distinct yellow yolks vanish, leaving a uniform, smooth, pale beige mixture. The creamy substance swirls around the mixing attachment, achieving a consistent, fluffy texture throughout the clear glass bowl resting on the wooden surface.

The electric mixer ceases motion within the smooth, pale beige batter. A significant amount of white flour is poured into the center of the glass bowl, piling atop the creamy mixture. Simultaneously, white text reading "FLOUR 2 1/4 CUPS" appears in the upper left corner of the frame.

A large quantity of white flour is added to the bowl, piling high over the creamy beige mixture. The text "FLOUR 2 1/4 CUPS" is displayed in the top left. The dry ingredient dominates the center of the glass bowl, obscuring the wet batter beneath.

The text overlay in the upper left corner changes to display SALT 1/4 TSP. The clear glass bowl continues to hold a large mound of white flour resting on the beige batter mixture. The scene remains static, focusing on the unmixed dry ingredients atop the wet base on the wooden table.

The clear glass bowl contains a mound of white flour atop the beige mixture. The text overlay in the upper left corner updates from "SALT 1/4 TSP" to "BAKING SODA 1 TSP". No physical mixing occurs; the dry ingredients sit undisturbed on the wooden surface while the label changes.

The white text overlay reading "BAKING SODA 1 TSP" vanishes from the upper left corner. The clear glass bowl sits stationary on the light wooden surface, containing a large, unmixed mound of white flour and dry ingredients resting atop the beige batter mixture. No physical movement or mixing occurs within the bowl.

A black electric hand mixer with silver beaters is lowered into the glass bowl, penetrating the mound of white flour and dry ingredients. A hand stabilizes the right side of the clear bowl on the wooden surface as the beaters begin to mix the contents.

The black electric hand mixer with silver beaters spins rapidly inside the glass bowl, actively blending the mound of white flour and dry ingredients into the beige batter beneath. A hand stabilizes the right side of the clear bowl on the wooden surface as the mixing action vigorously incorporates the dry components into the wet mixture.

The electric mixer blends the flour into the batter, forming a thick, crumbly dough. Silver beaters rotate within the pale mixture. White text "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" appears in the upper left corner. The dough clumps together around the beaters as mixing proceeds.

White powdery contents are poured into the center of the thick, crumbly dough mixture inside the clear glass bowl, forming a small mound. The text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains fixed in the upper left corner as the white pile accumulates atop the beige dough.

White powder continues piling into a central mound atop the thick beige dough mixture within the clear glass bowl. The text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains fixed in the upper left corner as the dry ingredients accumulate on the wooden surface.

White powder continues accumulating into a central mound atop the thick beige dough mixture within the clear glass bowl. The text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains fixed in the upper left corner as the dry ingredient piles higher, covering more of the underlying batter.

A large mound of white powder rests centrally atop the thick beige dough mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains fixed in the upper left. A silver mixer beater enters the frame from the top right, hovering above the accumulated dry ingredients.

Silver mixer beaters spin rapidly, plunging into the mound of white powder atop the thick beige dough. The dry ingredients begin incorporating into the wet mixture, creating a clumpy texture within the clear glass bowl while the text overlay remains fixed in the upper left corner.

Silver beaters rotate rapidly within the clear glass bowl, blending the white powder into the thick beige dough. The text "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains visible in the upper left as the dry ingredients incorporate into the clumpy mixture on the wooden surface.

Silver beaters continue spinning rapidly inside the clear glass bowl, further incorporating the white powder into the thick, beige dough mixture. The dry ingredients blend deeper into the wet base, creating a denser, crumbly texture while the text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" remains fixed in the upper left corner.

White shredded coconut pours into the clear glass bowl, accumulating on the thick beige dough. The text overlay updates to "SHREDDED COCONUT 1/2 CUP" in the upper left corner. The electric mixer is absent, and the coconut forms a central white mound on the mixture.

A white spatula featuring colorful stars and an orange handle enters the frame, pressing into the mound of shredded coconut atop the dough. A hand stabilizes the clear glass bowl on the wooden surface as the spatula begins to fold the white coconut flakes into the thick, beige mixture.

A white spatula with colorful stars and an orange handle folds the white shredded coconut into the thick beige dough inside the clear glass bowl. A hand stabilizes the bowl on the wooden surface as the ingredients are mixed together, blending the white flakes into the batter.

A white spatula with colorful stars and an orange handle continues folding the white shredded coconut into the thick beige dough. The spatula lifts and turns the mixture inside the clear glass bowl, further integrating the coconut flakes into the batter while a hand stabilizes the bowl on the wooden surface.

A hand uses a star-patterned spatula to fold white shredded coconut into the thick beige dough inside a clear glass bowl. The spatula presses and turns the mixture, further integrating the coconut flakes while another hand stabilizes the bowl on the wooden surface.

The scene shifts to show a baking sheet lined with white parchment paper next to the glass bowl containing the finished dough. A metal scoop rests in the dough. Hands roll a portion of the beige mixture into a smooth ball and place it on the parchment paper.

A pair of hands rolls a scoop of thick beige dough into a round ball on a white parchment-lined baking sheet. To the left, a single formed dough ball rests on the paper. A clear glass bowl containing the remaining dough and a metal ice cream scoop sits adjacent to the tray on the wooden surface.

A metal scoop rests in the clear glass bowl of thick dough on the left. Hands roll a beige dough ball on the white parchment paper. A second formed dough ball sits at the top right of the baking sheet.

A metal scoop rests in the dough bowl on the left. On the right, a baking sheet lined with white parchment paper now displays two round balls of beige dough. One ball remains near the bottom center, while a second ball has been placed near the top right corner.

The baking sheet holding the rolled dough balls is removed from view. White text overlay reading "BAKE AT 350F FOR 8-10 MINS" appears on the wooden table surface to the right of the glass bowl, which sits on the left edge and still holds the metal scoop and remaining cookie dough.

The video cuts to the baked cookies resting on a light wooden surface. Several pale golden, round cookies with slightly cracked tops are arranged in rows. Small white flakes of coconut are scattered loosely on the wood between the finished treats.

The camera zooms in on the pale golden baked cookies arranged on the light wooden surface. This closer perspective highlights the cracked textures on the cookie tops and clearly shows the white coconut flakes scattered loosely between the finished treats on the table.

The camera framing widens to reveal a grid of approximately nine pale golden cookies arranged on the light wooden surface. The baked treats feature cracked tops and are surrounded by scattered white coconut flakes, displaying the full batch rather than the previous close-up view.

A hand enters the frame from the upper left, fingers reaching down toward the baked goods. The fingers gently touch the side of a pale golden cookie located on the left side of the wooden surface, interacting with the arrangement of treats and scattered white coconut flakes.

A hand holds a pale golden cookie with a large bite taken out, exposing the soft, pale interior crumb. The broken treat is positioned centrally above the wooden board, surrounded by other whole cookies and scattered white coconut flakes.

A hand holds a pale golden cookie with a large bite removed, exposing the soft, crumbly interior texture. The treat is positioned centrally above a light wooden board scattered with white coconut flakes and surrounded by several other whole, baked cookies.

The scene transitions abruptly to a solid purple background. White sans-serif text reading "recipes" appears at the bottom left. Then, the phrase "with rachel" appears next to it, centering the full title "recipes with rachel" along the bottom edge of the plain purple screen.

The video displays a static title card with a solid purple background. White sans-serif text reading "recipes with rachel" remains fixed along the bottom edge of the screen. No new visual elements appear, and the scene holds steady as the final outro graphic for the content.

summary.text: Round pale golden cookies rest on a light wooden surface with scattered white coconut flakes. Centered white text reads "COCONUT CREAM COOKIES" over the baked goods. The camera pans slightly right, revealing additional cookies and flakes along the frame edge while keeping the central arrangement in focus under soft, consistent lighting. A hand enters from the top left, fingers reaching toward a central cookie broken open to reveal a soft, pale interior. The fingers gently touch the exposed crumb while the text overlay remains fixed. The scene transitions to an empty light wooden surface. A hand enters from the right, placing a large, clear glass bowl in the center of the frame. The bowl reflects overhead lighting as it settles on the wood.

From 14-16s, white granulated sugar pours from a white container into a clear glass bowl containing yellow butter, accumulating centrally while the text 'SUGAR 1/4 CUP' remains in the upper left. At 16-18s, a distinct mound of packed brown sugar appears atop the white sugar, and the overlay changes to 'BROWN SUGAR 3/4 CUP'. Between 18-20s, the camera zooms in as a large quantity of loose, dark brown sugar is dumped in, scattering over the existing ingredients and dominating the bowl's contents. Finally, from 20-22s, silver metal beaters from a hand mixer lower into the glass bowl, sinking into the mixture of sugars and butter, positioning themselves for mixing on the wooden table.

[22-28] Silver metal beaters spin rapidly within a clear glass bowl, blending brown sugar, white sugar, and butter. The mixture transitions from granular ingredients into a smooth, pale tan cream. A finger appears at the bottom right edge, steadying the bowl on the wooden surface as the camera view widens to show the full bowl containing the uniform, fluffy beige batter. [28-30] The silver beaters stop spinning inside the bowl. New white text appears in the top left corner reading "EGGS 2 EGGS" as the creamy batter remains settled on the wooden table.

[32-36] A silver spoon pours clear liquid over two raw eggs resting in beige batter as the text "COCONUT EXTRACT 1 TSP" appears. Once the spoon leaves, the bright yellow yolks sit atop the creamy mixture in the glass bowl. [36-40] Silver metal beaters spin rapidly, plunging into the bowl to break the yolks. The eggs and liquid swirl into the pale batter, creating marbled yellow and tan streaks. The mixture blends into a wetter consistency as the beaters vigorously combine the ingredients.

From 40-42s, silver beaters spin rapidly within a clear glass bowl on a wooden surface, fully incorporating eggs into a creamy mixture. The distinct yellow yolks vanish, leaving a uniform, smooth, pale beige batter with a fluffy texture. At 42s, the mixer ceases motion. White flour is poured into the center, piling atop the batter. The text 'FLOUR 2 1/4 CUPS' appears in the upper left corner. Through 46s, a large quantity of white flour accumulates, dominating the center and obscuring the wet base. Finally, at 46-48s, the text overlay changes to 'SALT 1/4 TSP' while the scene remains static, showing the unmixed mound of dry ingredients resting on the beige mixture.

[48-50] A clear glass bowl holds a beige mixture topped with a mound of white flour. Text updates from "SALT 1/4 TSP" to "BAKING SODA 1 TSP" while ingredients sit undisturbed on the wooden surface. [50-52] The "BAKING SODA 1 TSP" text vanishes. The bowl is stationary with unmixed dry ingredients resting on the batter. [52-54] A black electric hand mixer with silver beaters lowers into the bowl, penetrating the flour mound. A hand stabilizes the right side of the clear bowl. [54-56] The mixer spins rapidly, blending white flour into the beige batter. The hand stabilizes the bowl on the wooden surface as beaters vigorously incorporate dry components into the wet mixture.

[56-58] An electric mixer with silver beaters rotates within a pale mixture, blending flour into a thick, crumbly dough inside a clear glass bowl. The dough clumps around the beaters as mixing proceeds, while white text "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" appears in the upper left. [58-64] White powdery contents are poured into the center of the thick, beige dough mixture, forming a small mound that grows higher. The text overlay remains fixed as the dry ingredients accumulate atop the batter, covering more of the underlying mixture on the wooden surface.

Inside a clear glass bowl resting on a light wooden surface, a large mound of white powder rests centrally atop a thick beige dough mixture, identified by the white text overlay "COCONUT CREAM PUDDING 1 PACKAGE" fixed in the upper left corner. Silver mixer beaters enter from the top right and begin spinning rapidly, plunging into the accumulated dry ingredients. As the beaters rotate at high speed, the white powder is aggressively incorporated into the wet base, transforming the separate layers into a unified, clumpy texture. The mixing continues, blending the dry ingredients deeper into the dough to create a denser, crumbly consistency throughout the bowl.

[72-74] White shredded coconut pours into a clear glass bowl containing thick beige dough, accumulating as a central white mound while the text overlay "SHREDDED COCONUT 1/2 CUP" appears in the upper left. [74-76] A white spatula featuring colorful stars and an orange handle enters the frame, pressing into the coconut mound as a hand stabilizes the clear glass bowl on the wooden surface. [76-80] The spatula folds and lifts the mixture, turning the thick beige dough to integrate the white coconut flakes into the batter. The hand continues to stabilize the bowl throughout the mixing process, ensuring the ingredients blend thoroughly within the clear glass container.

[80-82] A hand uses a star-patterned spatula to fold white shredded coconut into thick beige dough inside a clear glass bowl, while another hand stabilizes the bowl on the wooden surface. [82-88] A baking sheet lined with white parchment paper sits next to the bowl, where a metal scoop rests in the dough. Hands roll scoops of beige dough into smooth balls and place them on the parchment. One dough ball rests on the paper, and later a second ball sits at the top right. The clear glass bowl containing remaining dough and the metal ice cream scoop sits adjacent to the tray.

[88-90] A metal scoop rests in the dough bowl on the left. On the right, a baking sheet lined with white parchment paper displays rows of round balls of beige dough. [90-92] The baking sheet is removed. White text overlay reading "BAKE AT 350F FOR 8-10 MINS" appears on the wooden table right of the glass bowl with the scoop and dough. [92-96] Cut to baked cookies on a light wooden surface. Pale golden, round cookies with slightly cracked tops are arranged in rows. Small white coconut flakes are scattered loosely on the wood. The camera zooms in, highlighting the cracked textures and coconut flakes on the finished treats.

[96-98] The camera framing widens to reveal a grid of approximately nine pale golden cookies arranged on a light wooden surface, featuring cracked tops and scattered white coconut flakes. [98-100] A hand enters the frame from the upper left, fingers reaching down to gently touch the side of a pale golden cookie located on the left side of the wooden surface. [100-104] A hand holds a pale golden cookie with a large bite taken out, exposing the soft, pale interior crumb and crumbly texture. The treat is positioned centrally above the light wooden board, surrounded by several other whole, baked cookies and scattered white coconut flakes.
